hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: SM Luxury Hotel in Fergana offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a work desk, minibar, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy a sauna, terrace, indoor swimming pool, and free on-site private parking. Additional amenities include a balcony, bath, and interconnected rooms.
Dining Experience: The modern, romantic restaurant serves French, American, Japanese, Korean, Middle Eastern, Russian, and European cuisines. A buffet breakfast is available each morning.
Convenient Services: The hotel provides a paid airport shuttle service, 24-hour front desk, room service, and free WiFi throughout the property.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: VOYAGE HOTEL in Fergana offers rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden or inner courtyard views. Each room includes a work desk, free toiletries, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a beautiful garden, free WiFi, and a lounge. Additional amenities include a minibar, refrigerator, and parquet floors, ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay.
Delicious Breakfast: A variety of breakfast options are available, including continental, buffet, and halal. Breakfast includes warm dishes, fresh pastries, pancakes, cheese, fruits, and juice, highly praised by guests.
Convenient Location: Located 4 km from Fergana International Airport, the hotel provides free off-site private parking and a paid shuttle service.
